title: DO NOT SAY THE NAME OF THIS BLOCK!
description: Removes ALL blocks in a chunk if you say its name!
body:
[![join my tg channel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dda5aef60f5a12da1753f577f55952cabe61bd9.gif)](https://t.me/fenny0I3)

---

# **THIS MOD IS NOT MEANT FOR NORMAL GAMEPLAY!**

FUN MOD TO PLAY WITH FRIENDS!!!

This mod removes ALL blocks in a chunk whose names you say out loud. For example, you say “Grass” and all Grass Blocks get deleted. Try beating the game like this… or just mess around with your friends.

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/356ebf107c4b6784b6a1cd3d09b613ab19e325c5.jpeg)

---

<details>
<summary>HOW TO SET UP?</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mvU6HP3lxh0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

1. Open Mod Menu and find **DO NOT SAY THE NAME OF THIS BLOCK!**
2. Select your microphone in the microphone settings. ![mic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29a92f571e5fad27d8f87eec640455c421449467_0.webp)
3. Click the **"Download model..."** button. ![modelbutton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c99b02bc61b3a29f00bc8b89804c470d8e85efff_0.webp)
4. Choose a model to download and click **Download**. The better the model, the more accurate the speech recognition will be, but it will require more PC power. ![downloadmodel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fae42689c5763b8122cd2a0a6fe0511c9b5c148_0.webp)
5. IMPORTANT: Reopen the config menu and select the downloaded model in the **STT Model** field.
6. Make sure your Minecraft language matches the language you’ll be speaking.

</details>
